code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut start = -1
while i < n
  let b = byte_of(text, i)
  if is_space(b)
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(text, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if not list.contains(tokens, v)
          tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(text, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if not list.contains(tokens, v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut remaining = tokens
while list.len(remaining) > 0
  let m = match list.min(remaining)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
  mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  let rn = list.len(remaining)
  mut removed = false
  while j < rn
    let v = get_or_zero(remaining, j)
    if v == m and not removed
      removed = true
    else
      new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  remaining = new_rem
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let sn = list.len(sorted)
while k < sn
  let v = get_or_zero(sorted, k)
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
